project.name: Legacy Staff Evaluation Admin System
project.description: A legacy internal admin system for staff evaluation records, review reports, organizational scopes, role permissions, and audit-oriented workflow tracking.

sourceMaterials.summary: Mock dashboard screenshot text with navigation, summary cards, filters, and export action.
Mock employee list screenshot text with organization filters, employee table columns, and employee actions.
Mock evaluation records screenshot text with filters, status labels, table columns, and workflow actions.
Mock evaluation detail screenshot text with review comments, risk level, actions, and operation log section.
Mock permission settings screenshot text with roles, permission columns, and data scopes.
Employee sample data with company, department, group, role, status, joined date, and supervisor relationship.
Department sample data with company, manager, and status fields.
Evaluation record sample data with employee, period, score, status, submitter, reviewer, and timestamps.
Bilingual business notes describing system use, organizational scopes, permission uncertainty, and auditability.
Role notes for President, Company Admin, Department Manager, Group Leader, Evaluator, and Viewer.
Workflow notes for draft, submitted, reviewed, approved, and rejected states with unresolved transition rules.

modules.name: Dashboard
modules.description: Provide filtered evaluation summaries and pending-review shortcuts.

modules.name: Staff Management
modules.description: Manage employee records, organizational scopes, status, import, and export.

modules.name: Evaluation Records
modules.description: Create, submit, review, approve, reject, and audit evaluation records.

modules.name: Review Reports
modules.description: Review and export evaluation report summaries.

modules.name: Permission Settings
modules.description: Configure role-based action permissions and data scopes.

pages.name: Dashboard
pages.purpose: Show evaluation summary cards and navigation into review work.

pages.name: Employee List
pages.purpose: View, filter, create, edit, deactivate, import, and export employee records.

pages.name: Evaluation Records
pages.purpose: List, filter, submit, review, and export evaluation records.

pages.name: Evaluation Detail
pages.purpose: Review evaluation details, comments, risk level, history, and operation logs.

pages.name: Review Reports
pages.purpose: Review report summaries for evaluation records.

pages.name: Permission Settings
pages.purpose: View and configure roles, actions, and data scopes.

entities.name: Employee
entities.description: A staff member included in evaluation and organizational management.

entities.name: Department
entities.description: A company-level organizational unit with manager and status fields.

entities.name: Group
entities.description: A department-level team scope used for filtering and group leader responsibilities.

entities.name: EvaluationRecord
entities.description: A performance or inspection record for an employee during an evaluation period.

entities.name: Role
entities.description: A named access profile assigned to a user account.

entities.name: Permission
entities.description: A role/action/data-scope rule controlling what users may do.

entities.name: User / Account
entities.description: A login account or actor associated with employees, submitters, reviewers, and approvers.

entities.name: AuditLog
entities.description: A record of who submitted, reviewed, approved, rejected, or edited an evaluation record.

roles.name: President
roles.description: Executive account with all-company visibility; export and direct edit authority need confirmation.

roles.name: Company Admin
roles.description: Company-level administrator for records, employee import, and possibly company-level role configuration.

roles.name: Department Manager
roles.description: Department-level reviewer for evaluation records; cross-department visibility and export need confirmation.

roles.name: Group Leader
roles.description: Group-level actor that submits evaluation records for group members.

roles.name: Evaluator
roles.description: Actor that can create and submit evaluation records; review or approval permission is unclear.

permissions.condition: President can view all company, department, group, and employee records.
President may export reports, but this must be confirmed.
Company Admin usually manages records within own company.
Company Admin can import employee data for their company.
Company-level role configuration boundary requires review.
Department Manager usually reviews records within their department; cross-department view access is unclear.
Department Manager usually reviews records; final approval authority is unclear.
Department Manager export permission is unclear.
Final approval after review may or may not be held by Department Manager.
Group Leaders submit evaluation notes for group members.
Group Leaders may edit draft records before submission; edit after submission is unclear.
Group Leaders can submit evaluation records for group members.
Evaluators can submit records for review; review or approval permission is unclear.
Viewer can view assigned records and should not mutate records.

workflows.name: Evaluation Review Workflow
workflows.trigger: A Group Leader or Evaluator creates a draft evaluation record for an employee.

acceptanceCriteria.title: Department Manager scope is enforced
acceptanceCriteria.description: A Department Manager should only see records within their department unless cross-department access is confirmed.

acceptanceCriteria.title: Export permission is explicit
acceptanceCriteria.description: Only roles confirmed to have export permission can export evaluation records or monthly summaries.

acceptanceCriteria.title: Viewer role remains read-only
acceptanceCriteria.description: Viewer can view assigned records but cannot create, edit, approve, import, export, or configure permissions.

acceptanceCriteria.title: Draft records can be submitted and reviewed
acceptanceCriteria.description: A draft evaluation record can be submitted and then reviewed.

acceptanceCriteria.title: Submitted-record edit behavior is confirmed
acceptanceCriteria.description: Submitted records should only be editable according to the confirmed workflow rule.

acceptanceCriteria.title: Rejected records do not become final
acceptanceCriteria.description: A rejected record should not become final or appear as approved in reports.

acceptanceCriteria.title: Final approval authority is enforced
acceptanceCriteria.description: Only the confirmed approver role can approve reviewed evaluation records.

acceptanceCriteria.title: Final record state is explicit
acceptanceCriteria.description: The implementation must not treat reviewed, approved, and final records as equivalent until the final-state rule is confirmed.

acceptanceCriteria.title: Employee records include required organizational fields
acceptanceCriteria.description: Employee records include company, department, group, role, status, joined date, and supervisor relationship where available.

acceptanceCriteria.title: Employee deactivation is preserved until deletion rules are confirmed
acceptanceCriteria.description: The implementation should support deactivation and should not assume permanent deletion.

acceptanceCriteria.title: Evaluation records preserve lifecycle fields
acceptanceCriteria.description: Evaluation records include employee, period, score, status, submitted_by, reviewed_by, submitted_at, and reviewed_at fields.

acceptanceCriteria.title: Evaluation actions retain actor history
acceptanceCriteria.description: The system retains who submitted, reviewed, approved, rejected, or edited an evaluation record.

acceptanceCriteria.title: Audit log visibility follows role rules
acceptanceCriteria.description: Operation logs are visible only to roles confirmed to have audit visibility.

acceptanceCriteria.title: Dashboard summaries respect active filters
acceptanceCriteria.description: Dashboard cards update when Company, Department, or Evaluation Period filters change.

openQuestions.question: Can Department Managers view records outside their own department?
openQuestions.questionZh: 部门主管是否可以查看本部门以外的记录？
openQuestions.whyItMatters: This determines API filtering, report access, and acceptance tests for department-level roles.

openQuestions.question: Can Group Leaders edit submitted records after review has started?
openQuestions.questionZh: 组长是否可以在审核开始后编辑已提交记录？
openQuestions.whyItMatters: This changes workflow state transitions, edit permissions, and audit requirements.

openQuestions.question: Who can approve reviewed evaluation records?
openQuestions.questionZh: 谁可以最终通过已复核的评估记录？
openQuestions.whyItMatters: Final approval authority affects role design, workflow transitions, and audit logs.

openQuestions.question: Who can export evaluation records?
openQuestions.whyItMatters: Export can expose sensitive employee evaluation data and needs strict access control.

openQuestions.question: Is approval required before an evaluation record becomes final?
openQuestions.questionZh: 评估记录成为最终记录前是否必须经过 approval？
openQuestions.whyItMatters: This determines final-state logic, reporting eligibility, and acceptance criteria.

openQuestions.question: Can rejected records return to draft?
openQuestions.questionZh: 被退回的记录是否可以回到草稿状态？
openQuestions.whyItMatters: This affects state machine design and edit permissions after rejection.

openQuestions.question: Are operation logs visible to all roles or only admins?
openQuestions.questionZh: 操作日志是否所有角色可见，还是仅管理员可见？
openQuestions.whyItMatters: Log visibility affects privacy, compliance, and UI permissions.

openQuestions.question: Are inactive employees included in evaluation reports?
openQuestions.questionZh: 停用员工是否进入评估报表？
openQuestions.whyItMatters: Reporting counts and filters may change based on inactive employee inclusion.

openQuestions.question: Should employee records be soft-deleted or only deactivated?
openQuestions.questionZh: 员工记录应软删除，还是只允许停用？
openQuestions.whyItMatters: Delete/deactivate behavior affects retention, auditability, and UI actions.

openQuestions.question: Should Dashboard summary cards be configurable?
openQuestions.questionZh: Dashboard 汇总卡片是否需要可配置？
openQuestions.whyItMatters: Configurability affects dashboard settings and admin configuration scope.

openQuestions.question: Should risk level be manually assigned or calculated from score?
openQuestions.questionZh: 风险等级应手动指定，还是根据评分计算？
openQuestions.whyItMatters: Risk-level design affects data modeling and evaluation detail behavior.

assumptions.statement: Employee records should be deactivated rather than permanently deleted.
assumptions.statementZh: 员工记录应停用而不是永久删除。
assumptions.reason: The employee list shows a deactivate action and does not show delete; auditability notes also favor retention.

assumptions.statement: Risk level may be derived from score or reviewer judgment.
assumptions.statementZh: 风险等级可能由评分或审核人判断生成。
assumptions.reason: Risk level appears on dashboard/detail materials, but no source confirms whether it is calculated or manually assigned.

assumptions.statement: Operation logs are required for auditability.
assumptions.statementZh: 为了审计性，系统需要操作日志。
assumptions.reason: Business notes explicitly require knowing who submitted, reviewed, approved, rejected, or edited a record, and the detail mock contains an operation log section.

mainBlockers: Export permission is not clearly defined
recommendedNextActions: Confirm role-based data scopes with the business owner
Confirm whether submitted records can be edited
Confirm who can approve and export evaluation records
Confirm audit log visibility by role
Regenerate the final handoff pack after review

suggestedImplementationOrder: Define Employee, Department, Group, EvaluationRecord, Role, Permission, UserAccount, and AuditLog models
Implement role and data-scope scaffolding with explicit review flags
Build Staff Management and Evaluation Records modules
Implement the Evaluation Review Workflow with guarded uncertain transitions
Add acceptance tests for permissions, workflow, data import, and audit behavior
